footer.brandDesc: Having connects Korean cosmetic ingredients, fragrance solutions, finished products, and OEM / ODM capabilities with global partners.
footer.tagline: Korean beauty trade, sourcing & export coordination
cookie.text: We use essential cookies to run this site and, with your consent, analytics cookies to improve it.
mega.ingredients.desc: Cosmetic ingredients, functional actives, and biotech materials
mega.fragrance.desc: Fragrance solutions for beauty, personal care, and lifestyle products
mega.finished.desc: Finished product lines, brand portfolios, and OEM / ODM opportunities
lead.hero.desc: A message from our founder and the principles that guide how Having works.
lead.sign.name: James Choi
lead.msg1: Having Corp. was founded with a clear purpose: to help Korean cosmetic ingredient suppliers reach markets beyond Korea.
lead.msg2: We began by helping Korean ingredient manufacturers reach markets beyond Korea, building a practical export track record along the way. Today, we continue to serve as a dependable bridge between Korean beauty suppliers and global partners.
lead.msg3: As our business has grown, we have expanded from ingredients into fragrance solutions, finished products, and OEM / ODM opportunities, while keeping practical sourcing and export coordination at the center of our work.
lead.msg4: As the beauty industry continues to change, Having will keep focusing on useful products, responsible partnerships, clear communication, and people who can turn opportunities into real business.
lead.philo.msg1: We believe lasting business is built between people. As a trusted partner, Having moves forward together with customers, suppliers, and the people behind every opportunity.
lead.philo.msg2: Work with Having, and you will find more than a supplier or coordinator. You will find a team committed to building practical opportunities together.
about.hero.desc: Having connects Korean cosmetic ingredients, fragrance solutions, finished products, and OEM / ODM capabilities with global partners.
about.s1.lead: Having Corp. is a Korean beauty trade partner supporting sourcing, supplier coordination, and export development across ingredients, fragrance, finished products, and OEM / ODM.
about.card1.text: Functional cosmetic ingredients, biotech actives, formulation-ready materials, and supporting technical documents.
about.card2.text: Fragrance sourcing and coordination for beauty, personal care, and lifestyle applications.
about.card3.text: Finished beauty products, brand portfolios, and OEM / ODM opportunities for overseas distribution.
about.s3.lead: A practical record of how Having has grown from cosmetic ingredient trade into a broader Korean beauty sourcing and trade coordination platform.
about.tl.2021: Ingredient consulting and overseas expansion strategy
about.tl.2026: Expansion into fragrance and finished products
about.s4.lead: Having connects Korean suppliers with buyers worldwide through a network of over 20 overseas partners, handling trade in both directions and building a practical bridge between Korea and the global beauty industry.
about.cta.title: Find the right beauty trade opportunity.
about.def.v1: Beauty trading and sourcing across ingredients, fragrance, finished products, and OEM / ODM.
about.def.v2: Ingredient suppliers, fragrance partners, finished product brands, manufacturers, and OEM / ODM companies.
about.def.v3: Overseas distributors, retailers, clinics, spas, professional channels, and import partners looking for K-beauty opportunities.
about.def.v4: Having works across product, market, channel, and trade conditions to find practical supplier-buyer fit.
about.tlx.2020: Started as a K-beauty trading company focused on cosmetic ingredients and overseas market development.
about.tlx.2021: Supported cosmetic ingredient companies with consulting and overseas expansion strategy.
about.tlx.2022: Built overseas agency relationships and prepared the foundation for a broader international trade network.
about.tlx.2025: Recognized under the national trade promotion program as a KITA-designated professional trading company.
about.tlx.2026: Expanded from cosmetic ingredients into fragrance solutions and finished products.
frag.hero.title: Fragrance Solutions
frag.hero.desc: Connecting global fragrance expertise with Korean brands and manufacturers.
frag.s3.lead: From cosmetics and fine fragrance to home fragrance and scent marketing, we work across the categories where scent shapes how products are experienced.
frag.s4.lead: From first contact to production, Having coordinates the conversations, samples, documents, and decisions that move fragrance projects forward.
frag.s5.lead: A practical partner for Korean brands, manufacturers, and global fragrance houses, combining cosmetic and chemical understanding with end-to-end coordination.
frag.s1.p1: A finished scent is the final step of a long journey, beginning with raw materials, technical expertise, creative direction, and the right partners behind it.
frag.s1.p2: Having connects global fragrance suppliers with Korean brands and manufacturers, coordinating the conversations, samples, documents, and decisions that move fragrance projects forward.
frag.s2.p1: The craft of fragrance carries centuries of heritage, from the historic perfume regions of France to today’s specialist scent laboratories. It is built on rare raw materials, patient development, and technical expertise shaped by people who understand scent.
frag.s2.p2: Having makes global fragrance expertise more accessible to Korean partners, bridging fragrance houses and suppliers with the brands and manufacturers who turn scent into market-ready products.
frag.do1.x: Understanding each project’s direction and matching it with the right fragrance partners, suppliers, or customers.
frag.do2.x: Coordinating documentation and compliance requirements so each fragrance is ready for its target market.
frag.do3.x: Clarifying requirements between manufacturers, suppliers, and brands.
frag.do4.x: Managing sample requests, evaluation rounds, and feedback between all parties.
frag.do5.x: Following technical and commercial details through development and production.
frag.do6.x: Providing Korean market insight so fragrance decisions are grounded in practical demand.
frag.cta.title: Looking for the right fragrance solution or partner?
frag.cta.ph: Tell us about your fragrance project…
frag.quote: “We support your fragrance project from raw material discussion to market launch.”
frag.why.v1: Cosmetic and chemical understanding applied across fragrance, formulation, and supplier communication.
frag.why.v2: Support coordinating fragrance documentation in line with IFRA standards and safe-use limits.
frag.why.v3: Allergen-conscious fragrance options for clean-beauty and sensitive-positioned products.
frag.why.v4: One partner across sourcing, sampling, documentation, regulatory coordination, and export support.
esg.hero.desc: Responsible trade principles for supplier review, documentation, and long-term beauty partnerships.
esg.sb.h: What responsible trade means at Having
esg.sb.li1: Reviewing suppliers and products with attention to quality, documentation, and responsible standards.
esg.sb.li2: Supporting Korean makers with clearer access to overseas buyers and long-term business opportunities.
esg.sb.li3: Keeping trade practical, documented, and transparent from inquiry to export execution.
esg.sb.para: Having Corp. is a sourcing and export coordination partner. We do not operate factories ourselves. Our approach to responsible trade focuses on how we review partners, coordinate documentation, communicate across borders, and support structured relationships between Korean suppliers and overseas buyers.
esg.s2.lead: Responsible trade at Having is shown through the way each opportunity moves: from sourcing review, to market access, to clear trade governance.
esg.s3.lead: Our approach to responsible trade is not a separate function. It is embedded in how we review opportunities, verify materials, coordinate stakeholders, and keep records across each transaction.
esg.s4.lead: We define responsible trade in the context of our actual role: a sourcing and export coordination partner working between Korean suppliers and overseas buyers.
esg.stage1.text: Partner and product review with attention to ingredient, packaging, quality, and documentation standards.
esg.stage2.text: Helping Korean makers reach global buyers through one coordinated trade channel.
esg.stage3.text: Clear communication, coordinated documents, and structured export records.
esg.card1.x: Review products and partners based on fit, product quality, documentation readiness, and responsible business practices.
esg.card2.x: Check available specifications, certifications, safety documents, and buyer-requested supporting materials where applicable.
esg.card3.x: Align buyer requirements and supplier capabilities across price, MOQ, lead time, claims, specifications, and documentation.
esg.card4.x: Maintain structured commercial and export records so each transaction remains clear, traceable, and actionable.
esg.p1.text: Environmental responsibility at Having begins with better partner and product review, not with manufacturing claims we cannot make.
esg.p1.li1: Consider ingredient, packaging, and documentation standards during supplier review.
esg.p1.li2: Support buyer requests for available environmental or packaging-related materials.
esg.p1.li3: Coordinate sourcing and shipment discussions efficiently where feasible.
esg.p2.text: We create access by connecting Korean brands, manufacturers, and ingredient suppliers with overseas business opportunities.
esg.p2.li1: Support Korean makers entering new markets through one coordinated trade channel.
esg.p2.li2: Facilitate buyer communication across distributors, retailers, clinics, and professional channels.
esg.p2.li3: Build long-term partnerships based on execution, not one-time introductions.
esg.p3.text: Our governance approach is practical: communicate clearly, document properly, and keep transactions structured.
esg.p3.li1: Clarify responsibilities, conditions, and commercial terms early.
esg.p3.li2: Coordinate documents such as specifications, COA, MSDS, certificates, and other requested materials.
esg.p3.li3: Keep trade practical, traceable, and proportionate to our business model.
esg.s1.h2:
Responsible trade,
shaped for the way
we actually work.

inq.hero.desc: Send us your product, ingredient, OEM / ODM, or fragrance inquiry, and we will help identify the right Korean partner.
inq.f.name: Name
inq.ph.name: Full name
inq.consent: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and consent to the collection and use of my personal information (name, email, phone, company, message) for the purpose of processing this inquiry. *
inq.title:
We’ll review your inquiry
and respond within
1–2 business days.
inq.lead: Tell us what you are looking for across products, ingredients, OEM / ODM, or fragrance, and we will help connect you with the right Korean partner.
inq.note: Sample requests, product inquiries, and partnership discussions are welcome. We typically respond within 1–2 business days.
inq.formNote: * Required fields. Your information is used only to respond to your inquiry and will be retained for one year after the inquiry is resolved.
